# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

database = postgres
pg_host = postgres
pg_port = 5432
pg_user = kong
pg_password = kong_password
pg_database = kong
pg_schema = public

admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000, 0.0.0.0:8443 ssl

log_level = notice
nginx_worker_processes = auto
mem_cache_size = 128m
dns_order = LAST,A,CNAME,SRV
dns_valid_ttl = 60
dns_stale_ttl = 60
plugins = bundled

headers = server_tokens,latency_tokens
trusted_ips = 0.0.0.0/0,::/0
real_ip_header = X-Forwarded-For
real_ip_recursive = on

nginx_http_server_tokens = off
nginx_proxy_buffer_size = 160k
nginx_proxy_buffers = 8 160k
nginx_proxy_busy_buffers_size = 320k

anonymous_reports = off
cluster_mtls = shared
cluster_telemetry_listen = 0.0.0.0:8006
cluster_listen = 0.0.0.0:8005
cluster_telemetry_endpoint = 127.0.0.1:8006

lua_ssl_trusted_certificate = system
lua_ssl_verify_depth = 3
